video_info.title: UEFA Champions League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Real Madrid welcome Bayern Munich in a heavyweight UEFA Champions League showdown, with two European giants colliding for continental supremacy. Los Blancos boast a strong home record in high‑stakes UCL nights, but Bayern arrive carrying their own legacy and firepower, eager to assert dominance. Will Madrid make home advantage count, or will Bayern deliver a statement win in Spain? Find out as we bring you all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025-26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: UEFA Champions League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Sporting CP take on Arsenal in a compelling European clash, with both sides eager to gain the upper hand and build momentum on the continental stage. The Portuguese hosts are strong at home and will look to set the tone early, but Arsenal arrive with pace and confidence, aiming to assert their authority away from North London. Will Sporting make home advantage count, or can the Gunners seize control on the road? Find out as we bring you all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025-26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: Main Woh Aur Fuji
video_info.shortDescription: In a world where love is filtered, scored and predicted, a couple in Pune collides in a fierce, consuming romance. What begins in urgency and desire slowly fractures. Seven years later, beneath the shadow of Mount Fuji, they meet again carrying different lives, different scars, confronting a past that never truly left them. Can love survive its own history or shall it merely haunt them? Witness Lalit Prabhakar and Mrinmayee Godbole in a fresh, new-age romantic movie Main Woh Aur Fuji, streaming from 10th April, on Sony LIV.
video_info.longDescription: In a world where love is filtered, scored and predicted, a couple in Pune collides in a fierce, consuming romance. What begins in urgency and desire slowly fractures.
